name: Stillborn Slayer
short_description: Stillborn Slayer is a dark fantasy action roguelike featuring fast-paced hack-and-slash combat, procedural runs, and brutal difficulty in a grim, horror-inspired world.
detailed_description:
Dark Fantasy Action Roguelike Combat

Stillborn Slayer is a dark fantasy action roguelike built around fast, punishing combat and replayable procedural runs. You battle through a grim, hostile world filled with monstrous enemies, relying on skill, timing, and adaptability to survive.

Each run presents new challenges, enemy patterns, and opportunities, encouraging mastery through repetition rather than scripted progression.

Fast, Brutal, Replayable Gameplay

Combat in Stillborn Slayer is immediate and unforgiving. Encounters are designed to reward aggressive play, quick reactions, and learning enemy behaviors. Death is expected — and progression comes from understanding the systems and improving with each attempt.

Procedural elements ensure that no two runs play exactly the same, making replayability a core part of the experience.

A Grim and Atmospheric World

The game’s dark fantasy setting leans heavily into horror themes and oppressive atmosphere. Environments, enemies, and tone are designed to create constant tension, reinforcing the sense that survival is never guaranteed.

Stillborn Slayer is aimed squarely at players who enjoy challenging action games and roguelike loops, not casual or story-driven experiences.

Key Features

  • Action roguelike gameplay with fast-paced combat

  • Hack-and-slash mechanics focused on skill and timing

  • Procedurally generated runs for high replayability

  • Dark fantasy and horror-inspired setting

  • Punishing difficulty designed for experienced players

  • Single-player, combat-focused experience
